contexts.context: ...Kallman once spent the winter.  He gave a <mark>party</mark> one evening, and afterwards I took two or...
...these days. My relations organised a splendid surprise <mark>party</mark> for my 70th birthday which went on all day...
...p·3 Para 2 Money pinched from Chesters jacket at <mark>party</mark>. Incident already referred to in bottom para P·13...
